prompt: before I close this session — do the hygiene check for /mnt/d/HealthCare_Digital_Fte. I want to see if the ADR index is current and whether there are any secrets or PHI issues
assertions: Output contains a HYGIENE REPORT section

Output runs the PHI scan and explicitly reports CLEAN or issues found
Output checks and reports the CLAUDE.md line count
Output reports the test suite health result
